title: Optional static browse/search site (no backend, no PII)
context: An optional static browse/search site improves time-to-find (O5) while collecting no PII and running no backend, consistent with the privacy posture (PLAN section 6/14, M3). Depends on the v0.5 release (016). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Build a static, backend-free browse/search site over the published catalog that collects no PII.
acceptanceCriteria: Static site (no backend, no server-side state) renders catalog records with search/filter; surfaces access-tier labels and provenance links.
No PII collected and no analytics that identify users; site builds from the published catalog artifacts only.
Reviewed by maintainer; build reproducible in CI.
output: A merged PR adding a static browse/search site generated from the published catalog (no backend, no PII).
